name: Maple Taffy Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash apples in warm water and dry well.
2. Remove stems and insert skewers into stem ends.
3. In a deep heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the syrup, brown sugar, butter, water, and lemon juice.
4. Over medium-high heat, bring to a rolling boil for 8-10 minutes, watching carefully.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Prepare a 4-inch deep pan of ice water.
7. Working quickly, carefully immerse apples into hot syrup, twisting to coat evenly.
8. Dip quickly into ice water then place on greased tray.
9. Cool completely in refrigerator.
